body:
Here at Your Green Guys, we value you and the environment. 

Our **Green Mission** is a standard we uphold in our all projects. That means we ensure proper disposal of waste, encourage the use of more sustainable materials, and prioritize native plant life. We do this to prevent chemicals and trash from washing into our streams and atmosphere where they can harm vegetation and wildlife.

**We offer a 10% service discount for all active & retired military service members. Thank you for your service!**
